name: Pistachio Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
The entire kitchen will fill with a delightful aroma. These cookies freeze well if wrapped tightly.
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until soft and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually combine the flour, baking powder, and salt with the creamed mixture and mix well.
4. Chill the dough thoroughly.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Roll out the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 inch (0.25 cm).
7. Cut shapes using cookie cutters and arrange them on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Sprinkle chopped pistachios over the top of each cookie.
9. Press down gently on the cookies with the back of a fork or rolling pin.
10. Bake for about 5 minutes, or until the edges begin to brown.
11. Remove from the oven and transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
Yield: Approximately 3 dozen cookies.
